pageHeader.title: Settings
pageHeader.description: Configure models, providers and processing parameters

whisper.title: Whisper Transcription
whisper.beamSizeTooltip: Higher values improve accuracy but slow down transcription
whisper.vadFilterTooltip: Voice Activity Detection - filters out silence

llmApi.title: LLM Translation
llmApi.timeoutTooltip: Timeout for each LLM API request in seconds
llmApi.temperatureTooltip: Controls translation creativity. Lower = more deterministic, Higher = more varied

huggingface.downloadSourceTooltip: Model download mirror. Use hf-mirror.com in China, huggingface.co otherwise
huggingface.downloadTimeoutTooltip: Timeout for model download requests in seconds
huggingface.hfTokenTooltip: Required for gated models (e.g., pyannote). Get your token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens

general.logRetentionTooltip: Automatically delete logs older than this many days

diarization.hfTokenNote: Requires accepting research terms on the HuggingFace model page before downloading.
diarization.hfTokenRequired: HuggingFace Token required. Please configure it in HuggingFace Hub settings below.
diarization.tokenRequiredContent: This model requires a HuggingFace Token for download. Please configure your token in the HuggingFace Hub section below.
